hero.title: ChatGPT Image 2 for AI image generation and editing
hero.description:
Create polished visuals with ChatGPT Image 2.
Generate new images, edit reference photos, render text in images, and produce transparent-background assets for real creative workflows.
hero.tip: Built for prompt-driven image generation, editing, and commercial visual creation

logos.title: Built on a production-ready AI image platform

introduce.title: What is ChatGPT Image 2?
introduce.label: Introduce
introduce.description: ChatGPT Image 2 is the core keyword and product positioning used on this site for a modern AI image generation and editing experience built around OpenAI's latest image capabilities.

items.title: Text-to-image creation
items.description: Generate new visuals from detailed prompts for concept art, product scenes, posters, and social graphics.

items.title: Reference-based editing
items.description: Upload one or more input images to preserve style, subject details, or layout during image editing workflows.

items.title: Commercial visual output
items.description: Produce marketing graphics, ecommerce visuals, social posts, stickers, and presentation-ready assets.

items.title: Practical prompt control
items.description: Use richer prompting for text rendering, visual edits, transparent backgrounds, and higher-fidelity output direction.

benefits.title: Why choose ChatGPT Image 2
benefits.label: Benefits
benefits.description: It is positioned for practical image generation and editing tasks where prompt control and output quality matter.

items.title: Generate and edit in one workflow
items.description: Use the same experience for fresh generations, reference-guided edits, and iterative visual refinement.

items.title: Stronger instruction following
items.description: Better suited for text placement, localized changes, composition control, and multi-constraint prompts.

items.title: Commercial-ready asset creation
items.description: Useful for branded creatives, product visuals, transparent-background assets, and high-quality social media output.

usage.title: How to create with ChatGPT Image 2
usage.description: A simple workflow for prompt-driven generation and editing:

items.title: Write a clear prompt
items.description: Describe subject, composition, lighting, materials, camera feel, text needs, and background requirements.

items.title: Upload reference images when needed
items.description: Use reference images to preserve product structure, style direction, character details, or scene layout.

items.title: Generate or edit
items.description: Run text-to-image or image-to-image workflows depending on whether you are creating from scratch or refining an input.

items.title: Iterate for a production-ready result
items.description: Refine text, composition, transparency, and visual details until the output is ready for design or commercial use.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions about ChatGPT Image 2
faq.description: Have another question? Use the generator to test the workflow directly.

items.question: Is ChatGPT Image 2 an API model name?
items.answer: Not exactly. On this site, ChatGPT Image 2 is the product-facing keyword. The closest current API-side model reference is gpt-image-2.

items.question: What is the main strength of ChatGPT Image 2?
items.answer: Its main strengths are high-quality generation, image editing support, stronger prompt adherence, reference image fidelity, text rendering, and transparent background creation.

items.question: Can ChatGPT Image 2 be used for ecommerce and marketing?
items.answer: Yes. It is especially relevant for ecommerce hero images, posters, branded creatives, social graphics, and reusable product assets.

items.question: Can I use ChatGPT Image 2 for image editing instead of only text-to-image?
items.answer: Yes. A key part of the positioning is that it works for both generation and editing workflows.

items.question: Does ChatGPT Image 2 always generate instantly?
items.answer: No. It is better understood as quality-first. More complex prompts and edits may take longer to finish.

items.question: When should I upload reference images?
items.answer: Upload reference images when you need to preserve a subject, style, product structure, or visual identity more precisely.
